title: Objects, Classes, Namespaces, and Binding · Contract Workshop
summary: Model a library circulation domain while tracing real Python object and attribute behavior. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of an inspectable library domain model while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Reason about object identity, type, value, mutability, equality, and lifetime in an object-oriented design.
Define classes and create instances while distinguishing class objects from the instances they construct.
Trace class, instance, module, and local namespaces during attribute lookup and assignment.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
